name: Suspicious Windows ANONYMOUS LOGON Local Account Creation
description: Detection of the creation of a local account with a name similar to 'ANONYMOUS LOGON'. This is a highly suspicious activity, as an adversary might create such an account to blend in with legitimate system processes and establish persistence.

prompts.prompt: A critical alert has been triggered on the host **{host}**: a new local user account, **{user}**, was created with a name that closely resembles 'ANONYMOUS LOGON'. This is a strong indicator of **Persistence** (**MITRE ATT&CK T1136**), where an adversary is attempting to create a backdoor or a stealthy account to maintain access to the system. The event occurred with Event ID **4720**. Immediate investigation is required to determine the legitimacy of this action and to remove the suspicious account. This event should be treated as a confirmed security incident until proven otherwise.

parameters.name: host
parameters.description: The name of the host where the event occurred.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The name of the suspicious user account that was created.
